entries.definition:
gh–l–y to boil; type of perfume. Of this root, two forms occur in a single place each in the Qurʾan: يَغْلِي yaghlī and غَلْي ghaly.
يَغْلِي yaghlī [imperf. of غَلَا ghalā] to boil (44:45) كَالْمُهْلِ يَغْلِي فِي الْبُطُونِ like molten tar boiling in the bellies.

غَلْي ghaly [v. n.] act of boiling (44:46) كَغَلْيِ الْحَمِيمِ like the boiling of hot water.

غَلْي ghaly [v. n.] act of boiling (44:46) كَغَلْيِ الْحَمِيمِ like the boiling of hot water.
